summary:
The service failed because notifications.py tried to access users.DEFAULT_ROLE at import-time, creating a circular import with users.py (which imports NotificationService).  
I removed the direct import and:

1. Added a lazy helper _get_default_role() that imports users only when needed (after all modules are loaded).
2. Re-implemented NotificationService to use that helper.
3. Deleted the duplicate, partly-edited class definition.

Running test.sh now:

PASS: All startup tests passed

The needle (import cycle) is fixed.
